title: WHAT (Spyglass meme)
description: A mod that does the silly spyglass meme well.
body:
# What Spyglass
A small Fabric mod that replaces the vanilla spyglass overlay with the WHAT meme template.

This mod shows the WHAT meme template, plays the full EarthBound "Guardian Battle" theme, and hides parts of the HUD while zoomed in. It delivers the meme in a cleaner format compared to that of a resource pack.

## Version support
This mod is currently compatible with versions **1.19 - 1.21.11**. Feel free to check out the [source code](https://github.com/Tim355Code/what-spyglass/tree/master)!

Currently required fabric loader version: 0.18.4.

## Contact
If you experience any bugs or issues, please report them at:
- Email: tmerk355@gmail.com
- Or Discord: tim_m_
